title: Axolotl Golden Apples
description: This project adds golden apples that look like blue axolotls!
body:
This texture pack is an overlay. It adds axolotl golden apples to BOTH golden apples and enchanted golden apples. Pls download, it took me a long time. (＾▽＾)

![OrezyMC Holding Both Golden Apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/881fc7da6f69cb4972a6c9273785a9bab6069f33.png)

Best used with Axolotl Totems (ദ്ദി˙ᗜ˙)

Thanks!
